name: Yduqs Participacoes S.A.
summary: Yduqs Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. operates as a higher education company. The company offers in-class and distance learning undergraduate courses in the areas of exact sciences, biological sciences, and human sciences with bachelor-level, teaching-level, and associate-level programs. It also provides lato-sensu and stricto-sensu graduate courses, master's programs, PhD programs, and extension courses. As of March 31, 2019, the company had a total of 561.3 thousand students; and operated 1 university, 10 university centers, and 37 higher education schools, as well as 93 campuses and 635 poles of distance learning education in Brazilian states and the Federal District.
